author.bio: Hi! We're Travis CI, the continuous integration and delivery service for your GitHub projects • Status: @traviscistatus • Travis Foundation: @travis_fnd
author.name: Travis CI

content.text: Hey there! 👋 Sorry to hear about the migration woes - I'd suggest emailing in to support@travis-ci.com and we can take a look and see what's going on. Thanks and happy building!
